mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, a.* FROM ( SELECT b.BANNER_ID AS bannerId, b.FK_MEMBERID AS fkMemberId, b.TITLE AS title, b.IMAGE_FILE_ID AS imageFileId, img.FILE_URL AS imageFileUrl, b.START_AT AS startAt, b.END_AT AS endAt, b.STATUS AS status, b.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, c.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, pt.created_at AS createdAt FROM TBL_BANNER b LEFT JOIN TBL_COMPANY c ON b.FK_MEMBERID = c.FK_MEMBERID LEFT JOIN TBL_IMAGE_FILE img ON img.FILE_ID = b.IMAGE_FILE_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FK_BANNER_ID, MIN(CREATED_AT) AS created_at FROM TBL_POINT_TRANSACTION GROUP BY FK_BANNER_ID ) pt ON pt.FK_BANNER_ID = b.BANNER_ID ORDER BY b.BANNER_ID DESC ) a WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{limit} ) WHERE rn > #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_BANNER SET STATUS = '승인완료' WHERE BANNER_ID = #{bannerId}
UPDATE TBL_BANNER SET STATUS = '정지' WHERE BANNER_ID = #{bannerId}
UPDATE TBL_BANNER SET STATUS = '승인완료' WHERE BANNER_ID = #{bannerId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BANNER WHERE STATUS = #{status}
SELECT BANNER_ID AS bannerId, FK_MEMBERID AS fkMemberId, TITLE AS title FROM TBL_BANNER WHERE BANNER_ID = #{bannerId}

SELECT b.BANNER_ID AS bannerId, b.FK_MEMBERID AS fkMemberId, b.FK_JOB_ID AS fkJobId, b.TITLE AS title, b.IMAGE_FILE_ID AS imageFileId, img.FILE_URL AS imageFileUrl, b.START_AT AS startAt, b.END_AT AS endAt, b.STATUS AS status, c.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName FROM TBL_BANNER b LEFT JOIN TBL_COMPANY c ON b.FK_MEMBERID = c.FK_MEMBERID LEFT JOIN TBL_IMAGE_FILE img ON img.FILE_ID = b.IMAGE_FILE_ID WHERE b.STATUS = '승인완료' AND b.START_AT <= SYSDATE AND b.END_AT >= SYSDATE ORDER BY b.PRIORITY DESC
